case Metadata::CLASS##Kind: \
write##CLASS(Out, cast<CLASS>(Uniquable), TypePrinter, Machine, Context); \
break;

◆ PrintLLVMName() [1/2]

void PrintLLVMName ( raw_ostream & OS,
const Value * V )
static

PrintLLVMName - Turn the specified name into an 'LLVM name', which is either prefixed with % (if the string only contains simple characters) or is surrounded with ""'s (if it has special chars in it). Print it out.

Definition at line 375 of file AsmWriter.cpp.

References GlobalPrefix, llvm::isa(), LocalPrefix, and PrintLLVMName().

PrintLLVMName - Turn the specified name into an 'LLVM name', which is either prefixed with % (if the string only contains simple characters) or is surrounded with ""'s (if it has special chars in it). Print it out.
